evals.description: Core trigger: first run of the day with no existing plan file. Tests full generation pipeline including continuation scanning.
expectations: Must read ROADMAP.md to extract System/Project/Milestone hierarchy
Must run git log and git diff ROADMAP.md in parallel with other context reads
Must check for yesterday's plan in .claude/daily-plans/ and skip gracefully if not found
Must scan continuations/ for recent files (last 3 days) and cross-reference with git log to classify as executed/unverified/not-started/stale
Must score work items using the NSM-impact scoring table with carry-forward at 85 and project >80% completion bonus of +10
Must score not-started continuations at 82 points, with FORGED-* prefix getting +3 bonus
Must surface max 3 continuations in the plan, preferring forged > master > unverified
Must assign complexity tags [TRIVIAL], [MODERATE], or [COMPLEX] to every step — never time estimates
Must write plan file to .claude/daily-plans/PLAN-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md
Every step in the plan must show System > Project > Milestone hierarchy chain
Must display chat summary with step count, complexity breakdown, and highest-impact step
Must wait for user approval before starting any work — never auto-execute

evals.description: Second+ call of the day when plan already exists. Tests resume-not-regenerate behavior.
expectations: Must read the existing plan file instead of generating from scratch
Must cross-reference ROADMAP.md and recent git commits against the existing plan to identify completions
Must show completed vs remaining steps as a refreshed summary
Must only regenerate the plan file if significant items have changed
Must show approval gate for remaining work — never auto-start

evals.description: Tests Vault Pulse section when Obsidian is configured and commands are overdue.
expectations: Must check vault_pulse_enabled parameter and .claude/obsidian-second-brain.local.md existence before running Vault Pulse
Must read .claude/vault-cadence.local.md for last-run dates
Must calculate overdue status: /drift (14-day cadence), /emerge (30-day cadence), /vault-review (14-day cadence)
Must query Supabase for pending vault_deposit actions or note MCP unavailability gracefully
Must include Vault Pulse section in the plan file after Context Health
Vault Pulse must be informational only — must never block the plan or change task scoring
Must surface vault summary in chat output if any item is actionable

evals.description: Tests continuation and forged prompt scanning when multiple recent prompts exist in continuations/.
expectations: Must glob continuations/ for files from the last 3 days
Must cross-reference each continuation filename/title with git log subjects to determine execution status
Must classify continuations as: Executed & Verified, Executed & Unverified, Not Started, or Stale
Must give FORGED-* prefix files a +3 scoring bonus over non-forged continuations
Must surface max 3 continuations in the plan with Continuation: path shown in each step
Must NOT auto-delete any continuation files
If >5 stale continuations exist, must add a housekeeping task to review and archive them

evals.description: Tests agent team offer after plan approval. Should propose parallelizable steps.
expectations: Must assess which plan steps are independent (no dependencies between them)
Must propose a team structure with named agents based on independent steps
Must NOT parallelize steps with write operations to the same systems
Must keep user-interaction steps with the lead agent
Must confirm team structure before spawning agents

evals.prompt: Build the authentication module for the dashboard
evals.description: Implementation request should not trigger daily-plan-generator. Should route to direct implementation or build-with-agent-team.

evals.prompt: Prime me on this codebase, I want to understand the architecture
evals.description: Codebase exploration request should route to /prime, not /daily-plan. Tests boundary discrimination between session-start commands.
